name: Certa
description: Certa — Third-party risk and compliance automation platform for vendor onboarding and continuous due diligence.

seo.title: Certa — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Certa: Certa — Third-party risk and compliance automation platform for vendor onboarding and continuous due diligence.

when_to_use: Supplier due diligence with continuous monitoring
Procurement compliance workflow with approval routing
ESG and regulatory compliance checks for vendors
Onboarding questionnaire automation for enterprise partners

pros: No-code workflow builder for complex vendor onboarding flows
Continuous monitoring pulls risk signals between reviews
Handles ESG, anti-bribery, and security in one platform
Integrates with procurement and ERP systems out of the box
cons: Implementation often takes months with heavy consulting
UI feels enterprise-clunky compared to modern GRC tools
Pricing is opaque and quoted per workflow complexity
Overkill for teams only doing security questionnaires
review.verdict: Powerful TPRM automation for large regulated enterprises, but expect slow onboarding and a clunky UX.
review.best_for: Global enterprises managing thousands of vendors across security, ESG, and compliance domains.
review.not_for: Startups or mid-market teams needing fast, lightweight vendor risk reviews.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
